nodes.context: A leading Chinese triad in Malaysia, based in Penang and Selangor, involved in drug trafficking, kidnapping, murder, extortion, racketeering, and loansharking.
A triad active in Malaysia, mentioned as one of the most active triads alongside Sio Sam Ong.
